name: MACSS Modernization
desc: Modernized 20+ legacy mainframe screens for the Missouri Child Support System into secure, responsive, Section 508 / WCAG-accessible ASP.NET Core Razor Pages backed by REST APIs and SQL Server stored procedures.

name: CSI 2.0 – Surety Bond Platform
desc: Full-stack surety bond platform digitizing Bond Search, Agent Management, Payments, Renewal / Billing, Inspections, Collateral, and Reports over an ASP.NET Core Web API and EF Core backend.

name: Activity Management Platform
desc: Activity and task-tracking SPA with full CRUD on a clean 5-layer architecture, applying MediatR / CQRS, FluentValidation, AutoMapper, and Entity Framework Core.
